objective: Run the Foundation /GOAL HEADLESS TRIAD against github.com/gretjia/turing to the highest mechanically provable no-human state by adding non-authority headless evidence wrappers and emitting honest NOT_RUN/BLOCKED artifacts where the selected repo lacks Rust authority-kernel or real runsc/Grok/Claude closure evidence.
